Status effects that increase defense are: Status effects that increase defense are {MODIFIER}% more effective for this character.
Reduces the effect of defense ailments b: Reduces the effect of defense ailments by {MODIFIER}%. The effect applies to this character and all its allies in the battle.
Status ailments that reduce defense are: Status ailments that reduce defense are {MODIFIER}% less effective against this character.
Duration of the first {MAXACTIVATIONCOUN: Duration of the first {MAXACTIVATIONCOUNT} status ailments this character receives from Special Skills is decreased by {DURATIONMODIFIER} turn.
Duration of the defense status ailments: Duration of the defense status ailments this character receives from Special Skills is decreased by {DURATIONMODIFIER} turns.
Duration of the first {MAXACTIVATIONCOUN: Duration of the first {MAXACTIVATIONCOUNT} buffs this character receives from Special Skills is increased by {DURATIONMODIFIER} turn.
When a status ailment is cleansed from t: When a status ailment is cleansed from this hero, a new copy of the cleansed ailment is applied on a random enemy.
Every time this Gargoyle casts a Special: Every time this Gargoyle casts a Special Skill, all allies receive Softskin. The next {MAXACTIVATIONS} times they receive damage, it is reduced by {DAMAGEREDUCTION}%. They are also immune to all status ailments, mana reductions and Insanity. This effect can't be dispelled.

Every time this Gargoyle casts a Special Skill, their Softskin activates. The next {MAXACTIVATIONS} times they receive damage, it is reduced by {DAMAGEREDUCTION}%. They are also immune to all status ailments, mana reductions and Insanity. This effect can't be dispelled.
Every time this Gargoyle casts a Special Skill, their Stoneskin hardens. The next {MAXHITS} times they receive damage, it is dropped to 1. This effect can't be dispelled.
When this character casts their Special:
When this character casts their Special Skill, they mark a random enemy with a Hunting Flare for {TURNS} turns.
 A target marked with a Hunting Flare receives additional {FIXEDPOWER} damage when they receive a critical hit.
When this character casts their Special Skill, they get {ATTACK}% attack for {TURNS} turns. This effect can be active in addition to other effects that alter attack.
Once per battle, this Hero's element can: Once per battle, this Hero's element can be changed to the Element of your choosing for {TURNS} turns. Element can be changed by tapping this Hero when it does not have full mana.

The Seedling Fiend evolves into a Sprout Fiend after {EVOLVINGFAMILIAR1EVOLVETURNS} turns.
The Sprout Fiend evolves into a Blossom Mega Fiend after {EVOLVINGFAMILIAR2EVOLVETURNS} turns.

When this character is defeated, they su: When this character is defeated, they summon Slime Mega Minions to nearby allies with {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% HP and {FAMILIARATTACK}% attack inherited from this character.
If this character loses more than {DAMAG: If this character loses more than {DAMAGETHRESHOLD}% of max health at once, they summon a Slime Mega Minion for themselves with {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% HP and {FAMILIARATTACK}% attack.
Each time this character receives a Burn: Each time this character receives a Burn status ailment, they summon a Forest Guardian Minion for themselves. Forest Guardian Minion inherits {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% HP and {FAMILIARATTACK}% attack from this character.
Each time this character receives a Dama: Each time this character receives a Damage Over Time status ailment, they summon a Card Soldier Minion for themselves. Card Soldier Minion inherits {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% HP and {FAMILIARATTACK}% attack from this character.
Each time this character receives a stat: Each time this character receives a status ailment affecting their defense, they summon a Bull Minion for themselves. Bull Minion inherits {FAMILIARHEALTHPERCENT}% HP and {FAMILIARATTACK}% attack from this character.
Summons a Sparrow Minion for self when a: Summons a Sparrow Minion for self when an enemy summons any Minions by Special Skill.
When an enemy summons any Minions by a S: When an enemy summons any Minions by a Special Skill, this character summons a Cursed Sapling Fiend for that enemy.
When an enemy summons any Minions by a Special Skill, this character summons a Seedling Fiend for that enemy.
